name: lre-gh-action
description: GitHub Action for OpenText Enterprise Performance Engineering

scripts.copyJarToBundle: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const dir=path.join('java','target');const files=fs.readdirSync(dir);const jar=files.find(f=>f.endsWith('-jar-with-dependencies.jar'));if(!jar){throw new Error('No *-jar-with-dependencies.jar found in java/target');}fs.mkdirSync('bundle',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(path.join(dir,jar),path.join('bundle',jar));console.log('Copied',jar,'to bundle');"
scripts.build: ncc build src/index.js --license license -o bundle && npm run copyLicense
scripts.buildWebpack: webpack && npm run copyJarToBundle && npm run copyLicense
scripts.buildNpxW: npm install --omit=dev && npm i @vercel/ncc && npx ncc build src/index.js --license license -o bundle && copy java\target\*-jar-with-dependencies.jar bundle\ && npm run copyLicense
scripts.buildNpxU: npm install --omit=dev && npm i @vercel/ncc && npx ncc build src/index.js --license license -o bundle && cp ./java/target/*-jar-with-dependencies.jar ./bundle/ && npm run copyLicense
scripts.buildWebpackW: npm install --omit=dev && npm install --save-dev webpack && npm install --save babel-loader && webpack && copy java\target\*-jar-with-dependencies.jar bundle\ && npm run copyLicense
scripts.buildWebpackU: npm install --omit=dev && npm install --save-dev webpack && npm install --save babel-loader && webpack && cp ./java/target/*-jar-with-dependencies.jar ./bundle/ && npm run copyLicense

author: OpenText
